# Extract Model Residuals

Returns model residuals from an object of class `logitr`.

## Usage

``` r
# S3 method for class 'logitr'
residuals(object, fitted = NULL, ...)
```

## Arguments

- object:

  is an object of class `logitr` (a model estimated using the
  [`logitr()`](https://jhelvy.github.io/logitr/reference/logitr.md)
  function).

- fitted:

  Fitted values for an object of class `logitr` to use in computing
  residuals. Defaults to `NULL`.

- ...:

  further arguments.

## Value

A data frame of the `obsID` and the residuals (response minus fitted
values) extracted from `object`.

## Examples

``` r
library(logitr)

# Estimate a preference space model
mnl_pref <- logitr(
  data    = yogurt,
  outcome = "choice",
  obsID   = "obsID",
  pars    = c("price", "feat", "brand")
)
#> Running model...
#> Done!

# Extract the residuals from the model
residuals(mnl_pref)
```
